demographics_summary.description: 1–2 sentence summary of population, internet penetration, and social platform reach.

internet_users.description: Total number of internet users (formatted string, e.g. '34.5M').

social_identities_pct.description: Social media identities as % of population.

demographics_sources.description: Human-readable list of sources actually used for the demographics metrics.

preferred_sources.name: DataReportal
preferred_sources.notes: Always Use the latest Digital report for this country for internet users, social media identities, and platform reach (YouTube, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok).

languages_summary.description: 1–2 sentence summary of dominant language, script, and English proficiency.

script_direction.description: Script and writing direction (e.g., Latin, left-to-right).

regional_dialects.description: High-level summary of regional dialects or language variants.

languages_sources.description: Human-readable list of sources used for the language metrics.

preferred_sources.name: EF EPI
preferred_sources.notes: Use EF EPI for English proficiency level, rank, and score.

preferred_sources.name: Official Government Websites
preferred_sources.notes: Search freely on the web for "{Country} regional dialects" and prioritize national statistics offices and official government portals.

preferred_sources.name: Script and Writing Direction
preferred_sources.notes: Use this W3C page to determine script and writing direction, and whether the country uses multiple scripts.
